verses.text: Tu-in Samuel si a, Israel--te khempeuh kikhawmin ama hangin kap uh a, amaute in Ramah-a a inn-ah amah a vui uh hi. Tua ciangin Paran gamlakah David paisuk hi
Karmel mualah nasep a nei mi khat Maon khua-ah a om hi. Tuapa hau mahmah a, amah in tuu tul thum leh keel tul khat nei hi. Amah in Karmel-ah a tuumul a meet hi
Tua mipa' min Nabal hi a, a zi' min Abigail ahi hi. Tua numei, tei leh melhoih a thuah khat hi a, ahih hangin a pasal pen a ki-uk zolo mi leh a gamtatsia khat hi a, amah Kaleb mi ahi hi
Nabal in a tuumul a meetna thu David in gamlakah a za hi
Tua ahih ciangin David in a tangvalte sawm sawl hi. David in a tangvalte kiangah, “Karmel-ah paito-in Nabal kiangah pai un la, keima min tawh amah va hopih un
Hih bangin amah na hopih ding uh hi: ‘Nang tungah nopna om ta hen, na innkuan tungah nopna om ta hen, na neih khempeuh tungah zong nopna om ta hen
Gan mul meette na neihna ka za hi. Na tuucingte kote tawh omin amaute tungah siatna ka bawl kei uh a, Karmel-ah a om sungteng uh amaute in bangmah man'suahlo uh hi

Na tangvalte uh dong lecin amaute in nang kiangah hong genthei ding uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka tangvalte maipha na musak in; bang hang hiam cih leh pawi ni-in kong pai uh hi. Na neih sung pan nong piak theih peuhpeuh na nasemte leh na tapa David tungah pia in,’ ci un,” a ci hi
Tangvalte hong tun' ciangin amaute in hih thu khempeuh David' minin Nabal kiangah gen uh a, tua ciangin amaute in ngak uh hi
Tua ciangin Nabal in David' nasemte dawngin, “David kua ahi hiam? Jessi' tapa kua ahi hiam? Tulai-in a tote kiang panin a taikhia nasem tampi om hi
Ka anlum leh ka tui leh ka gan mul meette-a' dingin ka gawh ka sate la-in koilai panin hong pai cih ka theihloh mite tungah pia ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin David' tangvalte ciahkikin hih thu khempeuh ama kiangah a gen uh hi

David in a mite kiangah, “Mi khempeuh in na namsau uh kuah ciat un!” a ci hi. Amaute khempeuh in a namsau uh kuah uh a, David in zong a namsau a kuah hi. Mihing za li bang David' nungah paito uh a, mihing za nihte van ngakin om uh hi
Ahih hangin Nabal' nasem tangvalte khat in Nabal' zi Abigail kiangah thu genin, “En in, ka topa uh a hopih dingin gamlak panin David in kamtaite hong paisak a, amah in amaute na tai hi
Ahi zongin kote tungah tua mite hoih mahmahin kote in siatna ka thuak kei uh a, amaute tawh ka pai laiteng uh gamlakah ka om sungun bangmah ka man'suah kei uh hi
Tuute kemin amaute tawh ka omsung khempeuh uh sun leh zanin amaute in kote hong hu uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin hih thu thei in la, na hih ding ngaihsun in. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka topa leh a innkuan khempeuh tungah siatna tun'sak ding kingaihsun a, amah a khan'sia ahih manin kuamah in hopih theilo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin, anlum lum za nih, leenggahzu savun thawl nih, a han' minsa tuu nga, ankan' lawh nga, leenggahkeu bawk za khat, leh theimoh za nih la-in late tungah tuate a guang hi
Tuanu in a tangvalte kiangah, “Keima mai-ah na paisuak un; note' nungah kei kong pai ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin amah in a pasal Nabal hilhlo hi
Amah la tungah tuangin mual liahah a paisuk laitakin, en in, David leh a mite ama lamah hong paisuk uh hi; amah in amaute na dawn hi
Tu-in David in, “Ama neihsa khempeuh khat zong a mangthanglo dingin hih mipa' neih khempeuh gamlakah a mawkna-in ka cing a, amah in hih thuhoihte a sia tawh kei tungah hong thuk hi
Zing ciangin ama neihsa khempeuh lakah pasal khat zong ka sit taak leh Pasian in keimah David hong dawm kei ta hen,” na ci khin hi
Abigail in David a muh ciangin kinawh a, a la tung panin tuakin David' mai-ah puk a, leilakah a kun hi
Ama khe phungah pukin, “Kei tung bekah, ka topa aw, mawhna om ta hen. Na kiangah na nasemnu thu hong gensak in la, na nasemnu' thugente hong ngai in, ci-in kong thum hi

Ka topa in hih a khan'sia mipa Nabal ngaihsun kei in; bang hang hiam cih leh ama min mah bangin amah zong a tuaci mah ahi hi. Nabal ama min hi a, haina in amah vukcip hi. Ahih hangin na nasemnu keimah in nangma hong sawl na tangvalte ka mukha kei hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in, ka topa aw, Topa nungta-in, nang zong na nuntak mah bangin, mi na thahlohna ding leh nangma khut tawh thukkikna na hihlohna dingin Topa in nang hong kho ahih manin, tu-in na galte leh nangma tungah siatna ding a zongte khempeuh Nabal bang ta hen
Tu-in na nasemnu keimah in nangmah ka hong puak hih letsong nangma nung hong zui tangvalte hong piasak in

Na nasemnu' khialhna hong maisak in, ci-in kong thum hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in Topa' galte do na hih manin Topa in na suanlekhakte kipsak paisuak ding a, na nuntak laiteng nang sungah siatna kimulo ding hi
Nangmah delhin hong that dingin mite hong kipat leh, nang pen Topa na Pasian' kepna sung a hing mite lakah na om ding a, amah in suanglotna tawh lotkhiat bangin na galte lawnkhia ding hi
Topa in nangmah tawh kisai thu a hoih a gente khempeuh tawh kizui-in hong hihin, Israel-te tungah ulianin nang hong koih khit ciangin

thu omlopi-in mi thahna ahi a, nangmahmah in phulakna hangin ahi zongin, dahna ding thu ahi a, lungsim natna ding thu ahi zongin na nei kei ding hi. Topa in limtakin nang hong bawl ciangin na nasemnu hong phawk in,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in Abigail kiangah, “Tuni-in keimah a dawn dingin nang a hong sawl Israel-te' Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
Tuni-in mi thahna leh keima khut tawh phulakna ding panin keimah hong kem nangma ngaihsutna in thupha ngah ta hen

Bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong gimsakna ding panin hong kho Israel Pasian, Topa a nungta taktak ahih mah bangin, nang hong kinawhin keimah a dawn dingin hong pailo hi lecin, zing ciangin Nabal sung pan pasal khat zong hing nawnlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin David in ama tung panin amah a puakte a sang hi. Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Lung nuamin na inn-ah ciahto ta in. Na thu ka ngai a, nong thumna kong pia khin hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Nabal kiangah Abigail hong tungkik hi. Kumpipa' pawi tawh kibangin amah in a inn sungah pawi na kham hi. Nabal lungnuam mahmah hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in zu kham mahmah hi. Tua ahih ciangin zingsang khuavak mateng ama kiangah bangmah gen peuhmahlo hi
Zingsang ciang, Nabal' zukhamna a ven' ciangin a zi in ama kiangah hih thute gen a, thakhatin a lungtang si-in amah suangtum bang hi
Tua khit ni sawm bang ciangin Topa in Nabal vat a, amah a si ta hi

Nabal a sihna thu David in a zak ciangin amah in, “Nabal khut tung panin ka ngah zahkohna hong thuksakin, siatna panin a nasempa a lenkik Topa in thupha ngah ta hen. Topa in Nabal' gamtat siatna ama lu tung mahah tungkiksak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin David in mi sawlin ama zi dingin Abigail helsak hi
David' nasemte Karmel-a Abigail' kiang a tun' ciangin amaute in tuanu kiangah, “David in ama zi dingin a la dingin kote nang kiangah hong sawl hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin amah dingin lei-ah maikun a, “En un, na nasemnu uh ka topa' nasemte' khe a silsak ding nasem ahi hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Abigail kinawhin dingin la tungah tuang a, ama nasem numei nga in amah a kem hi. David' kamtaite' nung zui-in pai a, tua ciangin ama zi a suak hi
David in Jezreel khuami Ahinoam zong la a, amaute gel ama zi a suak uh hi
Saul in ama tanu Mikhal, David' zi pen, Gallim khuami Laish' tapa Palti tungah na pia khin hi.
